summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-11 (backend commission logic with 9%→1% descending rates applied to total collection per level), REQ-12 (CommissionHistoryTable.tsx and EarningsSummary.tsx updated with corrected rate array and total-collection-based calculation), and REQ-13 (HomePage.tsx updated with exactly 9 commission levels showing 9% down to 1% with total collection descriptions). All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied based on the diff evidence.
